allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Token:', d['token'][:30]+'...'\); print\('Usuario:', d['usuario']['nombre'], '|', d['usuario']['email']\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)[0]; print\(d['deploy']['status'], d['deploy']['id'], d['deploy'].get\('finishedAt','in progress'\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const c=[]; process.stdin.on\('data',d=>c.push\(d\)\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const r=JSON.parse\(c.join\(''\)\); console.log\(r.status, r.finishedAt||'in progress'\)}\)")
Bash(node -e "const c=[]; process.stdin.on\('data',d=>c.push\(d\)\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const r=JSON.parse\(c.join\(''\)\); console.log\(r.status, r.finishedAt\)}\)")
Bash(node -e "const c=[]; process.stdin.on\('data',d=>c.push\(d\)\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const r=JSON.parse\(c.join\(''\)\); console.log\('Deploy ID:', r.id, 'Status:', r.status\)}\)")

Bash(node -e "const c=[]; process.stdin.on\('data',d=>c.push\(d\)\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const arr=JSON.parse\(c.join\(''\)\); arr.forEach\(d=>console.log\(d.deploy.id, d.deploy.status, d.deploy.createdAt\)\)}\)")

Bash(node -e "const c=[]; process.stdin.on\('data',d=>c.push\(d\)\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const r=JSON.parse\(c.join\(''\)\)[0].deploy; console.log\('Status:', r.status, '\\nCommit:', r.commit.message.split\('\\n'\)[0], '\\nIniciado:', r.createdAt\)}\)")

Bash(node -e "const c=[]; process.stdin.on\('data',d=>c.push\(d\)\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const arr=JSON.parse\(c.join\(''\)\); arr.forEach\(d=>console.log\(d.deploy.status, d.deploy.commit.id.slice\(0,7\), d.deploy.createdAt\)\)}\)")

Bash(node -e "const c=[]; process.stdin.on\('data',d=>c.push\(d\)\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const r=JSON.parse\(c.join\(''\)\); console.log\('ID:', r.id, '| Status:', r.status, '| Commit:', r.commit.id.slice\(0,7\)\)}\)")
Bash(node -e "const c=[]; process.stdin.on\('data',d=>c.push\(d\)\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const r=JSON.parse\(c.join\(''\)\); console.log\('Deploy:', r.id, r.status\)}\)")
